dev.jeka.core.api.project

Class JkProjectCompilation

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProjectCompilation

  • public class JkProjectCompilation
extends java.lang.Object
    Handles project compilation step. Users can configure inner phases by chaining runnables. They also can modify JkJavaCompilerToolChain and JkJavaCompileSpec to use.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      The JkRunnables to be run after compilation.

      The JkRunnables to run after source and resource generation.
      JkResourceProcessor resourceProcessor 
      static java.lang.String RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION

    • Field Detail

      • RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION

        public static final java.lang.String RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • JAVA_SOURCES_COMPILE_ACTION

        public static final java.lang.String JAVA_SOURCES_COMPILE_ACTION
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • preCompileActions

        public final JkRunnables preCompileActions
        The JkRunnables to run after source and resource generation. User can chain its own runnable to customise the process. Contains RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION by default

      • postCompileActions

        public final JkRunnables postCompileActions
        The JkRunnables to be run after compilation. User can chain its own runnable to customise the process. Empty by default.

      • resourceProcessor

        public final JkResourceProcessor resourceProcessor

      • layout

        public final JkCompileLayout layout

      • dependencies

        public final JkDependencySetModifier dependencies
